'''gazotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohmage|ohmage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohmage|ohmage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzetheth|gæzetheth]] || [[word:gæzethej|gæzethej]] || [[word:gæzethesh|gæzethesh]] || [[word:gæzethe|gæzethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazozothoth|gazozothoth]] || [[word:gazozothoj|gazozothoj]] || [[word:gazozothosh|gazozothosh]] || [[word:gazozotho|gazozotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazothoth|gazothoth]] || [[word:gazothoj|gazothoj]] || [[word:gazothosh|gazothosh]] || [[word:gazotho|gazotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazofthofth|gazofthofth]] || [[word:gazofthofj|gazofthofj]] || [[word:gazofthofsh|gazofthofsh]] || [[word:gazofthof|gazofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazothotho|gazothotho]] || [[word:gazothojo|gazothojo]] || [[word:gazothosho|gazothosho]] || [[word:gazothoko|gazothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazothoth|gazothoth]] || [[word:gazothoj|gazothoj]] || [[word:gazothosh|gazothosh]] || [[word:gazotho|gazotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazothothol|gazothothol]] || [[word:gazothojol|gazothojol]] || [[word:gazothoshol|gazothoshol]] || [[word:gazothokol|gazothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazothoothotho|gazothoothotho]] || [[word:gazothoojojo|gazothoojojo]] || [[word:gazothooshosho|gazothooshosho]] || [[word:gazothooko|gazothooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazothothon|gazothothon]] || [[word:gazothojon|gazothojon]] || [[word:gazothoshon|gazothoshon]] || [[word:gazothokon|gazothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazothothooro|gazothothooro]] || [[word:gazothojooro|gazothojooro]] || [[word:gazothoshooro|gazothoshooro]] || [[word:gazothokooro|gazothokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
